case_title: VIEYRA PATRICIA VS BARBIZON SCHOOL OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIEYRA PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARBIZON SCHOOL OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,508.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
